lever.name: scalar F64 Add/Mul value_and_grad dense reverse path
lever.summary: For guarded scalar-F64, param-free, effect-free, single-output Add/Mul Jaxprs with built-in VJPs, evaluate primals and reverse adjoints in dense f64 slots and bypass per-equation TapeEntry and Value allocation.

rejected_related_bead.reason: SmallVec tape-entry storage was removed and closed rejected so this pass is a distinct dataflow specialization, not another tape-container micro-lever.

benchmark.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-f2s2l-<baseline|candidate>-b0ba637-20260609a rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot
benchmark.rch_note: Both final baseline and candidate selected vmi1153651 and fell open locally after the same remote topology preflight failure: sh: 18: Syntax error: newline unexpected (expecting ")").

guard_conditions: custom Add/Mul primitive VJPs must be absent
custom Jaxpr VJP must be absent
args must match invars and be scalar F64
all equations must be param-free, sub-Jaxpr-free, effect-free, binary Add/Mul, single-output
all atoms must be vars or F64 literals
dense slot count must fit DENSE_AD_VALUE_STORE_MAX_SLOTS
isomorphism_proof.ordering: Forward equations execute in original order; reverse equations execute in reverse tape order. Add accumulates cotangents in input order. Repeated Mul accumulates g*x twice in the same order as try_accumulate_repeated_mul_vjp.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: The fast path uses the same scalar f64 + and * operations and the same exact-zero skip semantics as is_zero_value on F64Bits, including signed zero. It does not reassociate, vectorize, use FMA, or change NaN/Inf propagation.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No tie-sensitive primitive is routed. Add/Mul have no tie-breaking state.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or stochastic primitive is routed.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: Any unsupported shape, dtype, primitive, params, effects, custom VJP, sparse layout, or arity falls back to the existing forward_with_tape/backward path.
